title: orthotheca heterocalyx
intro: Orthotheca heterocalyx, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is primarily found in coastal areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Orthotheca heterocalyx include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce swelling. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and its dried flowers and roots can be used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
